recommendations.product_name: WeeRide Co-Pilot Front-Mounted Child Bike Seat
pros: Front-mounted for eye contact and easier monitoring
Easy attach/detach and folds for storage
Good for ages ~4–9 (higher weight limits than many front seats)
cons: Not suitable for very young infants

https://www.bicycleretailer.com/recalls/.title: Thule recalls RideAlong kids bike seats over chemical concern
https://www.bicycleretailer.com/recalls/.description: WASHINGTON (BRAIN) — Thule is recalling some RideAlong rear-mounted kids bike seats because the harness padding can contain an excess of a flame-retardant chemical that can be toxic if ingested or comes into contact with skin or eyes.The recall involves about 8,640 units sold in the U.S., and about 3,880 sold in Canada.Consumers should stop using the RideAlong and contact Thule Group to register for free replacement harness padding and to receive instructions on how to return the recalled padding.
